title: Onboarding & KYC UX Audit
titleLarge: Secure compliance through seamless user experience
desc: In today's dynamic business environment, to know to success lies strategic planning and operationals business success execution.
shortDesc: We provide the strategic roadmap to maximize conversion while maintaining strict regulatory compliance.
desc1: High abandonment rates during account creation cost you customers. We conduct specialized UX audits of your KYC (Know Your Customer) and identity verification flows. We identify friction points, simplify document uploads, and redesign your onboarding journey to maximize conversion while maintaining strict regulatory compliance. Stop losing hard-earned marketing dollars to a broken onboarding funnel.
overview1: Audit identity flows to reduce user abandonment.
overview2: Evaluate sign-ups to balance compliance and conversion.
overview3: Simplify document capture for low-bandwidth environments.
overview4: Stop wasting CAC on broken sign-up screens.

title: Trust Testing
titleLarge: Frictionless payment experiences that drive adoption
shortDesc: We conduct remote and localized usability testing for digital wallets, payment gateways, and core transaction flows
desc1: Does your target demographic trust your app with their money? We conduct remote and localized usability testing for digital wallets, payment gateways, and core transaction flows. By testing with real African consumers from digital natives to first-time USSD users we guarantee your product is intuitive, secure, and error-free. We ensure that every time a user hits "send," the experience is seamless, intuitive, and reassuring.
overview1: Ensure money moves faster with zero confusion.
overview2: Audit payment flows, digital wallets, and checkouts.
overview3: Design reassuring pending states and seamless USSD fallbacks.
overview4: Build flows that keep users actively transacting.

title: Trust Consulting
desc: In today's dynamic business environment, to know to success lies strategic planning and operationals business success execution.
shortDesc: We bridge the gap between complex financial data and human psychology, turning anxious users into confident investors.
desc1: Financial apps live or die by user trust. We provide strategic frameworks on behavioral science principles to visually reinforce security, encourage savings habits, and drive daily active usage. We bridge the gap between complex financial data and human psychology, turning anxious users into confident investors. Don't let a lack of localized trust signals make your app feel fraudulent to the average consumer.
overview1: Use behavioral science to visually reinforce security.
overview2: Inject localized trust signals into your UI.
overview3: Bridge complex financial data and human psychology.
overview4: Turn anxious first-time users into confident investors.

title: Customized User Research
desc: In today's dynamic business environment, to know to success lies strategic planning and operationals business success execution.
shortDesc: We provide quantitative data and ethnographic insights to ensure product-market fit from day one.
desc1: What works perfectly in Silicon Valley will fail under the realities of low-bandwidth networks and local financial habits. We conduct deep, contextual user research across specific African demographics. Whether you are building agency banking dashboards or micro-lending apps, we provide quantitative data and ethnographic insights to ensure product-market fit from day one.
overview1: Research demographic interactions with local digital finance.
overview2: Test products with first-time mobile money adopters.
overview3: Offer field research testing on spotty internet.
overview4: Design for low-end devices and low digital literacy.

title: Product Feature Mapping
desc: In today's dynamic business environment, to know to success lies strategic planning and operationals business success execution.
shortDesc: We align your product roadmap with user data and business goals (LTV, CAC).
desc1: Engineering capital is your most expensive asset. Don’t waste development hours building features your users don't need. We align your product roadmap with user data and business goals (LTV, CAC). We help you map out scalable features, from core ledger functionalities to peer-to-peer transfers, ensuring your engineering team is always building high-impact assets.
overview1: Map user journeys to pinpoint abandoned transactions.
overview2: Review internal UI work and map upcoming features.
overview3: Prioritize high-impact features to scale your platforms.
overview4: Save development money by fixing products early.

title: UX Team Training
desc: In today's dynamic business environment, to know to success lies strategic planning and operationals business success execution.
shortDesc: Refresh outdated websites with modern, appealing designs that align with current brand goals and user expectations.
desc1: If your internal team doesn't understand the psychology of digital money, your product will always struggle to scale. Upskill your in-house product managers, developers, and designers. Our specialized FinTech UX training covers everything from compliance mapping to building offline-first financial experiences. Equip your team with the specialized frameworks needed to build world-class, user-centric financial platforms.
overview1: Build practical, user-centered design capabilities internally.
overview2: Strengthen collaboration across product and engineering teams.
overview3: Equip teams with applied UX methodologies.
overview4: Scale UX knowledge across your organization.
